element.description:
Abyssal chickens are carnivorous, temperamental, tasty bottom-feeders native to the Abyss. They beat their leathery wings to scare predators and to help them run faster, and they taste like fatty chicken.

With your permission, a character who casts the find familiar spell can henceforth choose to conjure an abyssal chicken instead of a raven.
element.name: Abyssal Chicken

set.description: 30 ft., fly 30 ft. (see bad flier below)
set.name: speed

set.description: blindsight 30ft. (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 9
set.name: senses

element.description: The abyssal chicken falls at the end of a turn if it's airborne and the only thing holding it aloft is its flying speed.
element.name: Bad Flier
element.sheet: The abyssal chicken falls at the end of a turn if it's airborne and the only thing holding it aloft is its flying speed.

element.description: The abyssal chicken makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
element.name: Multiattack
element.sheet: The abyssal chicken makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.

element.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
element.name: Bite
element.sheet: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

element.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
element.name: Claws
element.sheet: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
